title: Mr Whippy Modpack (Vanilla Expansion)
description: A modpack that is just a better version of vanilla, just like Mr Whippy Icecream. This modpack has many client side mods, structure mods, 2 world gen mods, Comfort and Fabric Waystones
body:
This is modpack based around an improvement to Vanilla. This project is meant for fun and will not add a lot of content. This modpack is meant to seem similar to Vanilla, but it does not add much modded content, except for structures, but I still think everyone can enjoy the modpack as long as they enjoy vanilla. 

The Modpack is Based around Adventure and Exploration. However, this may change in future versions. I may continue to update this, and I may create a 1.20.1 version with more content. The main parts of the Modpack are:
-Client-Side Mods 
-Performance Mods
-World-Gen Mods
-Structure Mods
-And Other

You should download this modpack for an upgraded vanilla modpack. It is fun for me and my friends so I hope it is to you too. The Modpack upgrades Vanilla and does not add much extra content other than:
-Better Archeology
-Elytra Trims
-Fabric Waystones
-Nature's Compass
-No Durability
-Player Shops
-Return Copper Horns
-Traveler's Backpack
-More Axolotl Variants
-End Remastered
-Dramatic Doors
